buildCommand: if [ -d vantech-frontend ]; then FRONTEND_DIR=vantech-frontend; elif [ -d vantech-software-solutions-frontend ]; then FRONTEND_DIR=vantech-software-solutions-frontend; else echo 'Frontend directory not found' && exit 1; fi && cd "$FRONTEND_DIR" && npm install && npm run build && cd .. && rm -rf .next && cp -R "$FRONTEND_DIR/.next" .next
installCommand: if [ -d vantech-frontend ]; then FRONTEND_DIR=vantech-frontend; elif [ -d vantech-software-solutions-frontend ]; then FRONTEND_DIR=vantech-software-solutions-frontend; else echo 'Frontend directory not found' && exit 1; fi && cd "$FRONTEND_DIR" && npm install
devCommand: if [ -d vantech-frontend ]; then FRONTEND_DIR=vantech-frontend; elif [ -d vantech-software-solutions-frontend ]; then FRONTEND_DIR=vantech-software-solutions-frontend; else echo 'Frontend directory not found' && exit 1; fi && cd "$FRONTEND_DIR" && npm run dev
